# BeatMakerCard ## Summary The `BeatMakerCard` is a powerful card that provides a dynamic drum machine with features like real-time sound synthesis, pattern sequencing, and a library of drum kits and beat patterns. ## Import ```javascript import { BeatMakerCard } from '../beat-maker-studio-ee7489b1-5d8e-4d84-bcba-866f64bc15c6/beat-maker/beat-maker'; ``` ## Usage as a Field You can use the `BeatMakerCard` as a field within a consuming card or field. Here's an example: ```javascript import { CardDef, FieldDef, contains, linksTo } from 'https://cardstack.com/base/card-api'; export class MyCard extends CardDef { @field beatMaker = contains(BeatMakerCard); } ``` In this example, the `BeatMakerCard` is used as a field named `beatMaker` within the `MyCard` definition. ## Template Usage To use the `BeatMakerCard` within a template, you can reference the `@fields.beatMaker` property: ```handlebars
<@fields.beatMaker />
``` This will render the `BeatMakerCard` within the template of the consuming card or field.
